verses.text: Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih sila keimah James in Leitung mun khempeuhah kithehthangin a om minam sawmlenihte tungah hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi.
Sanggamte aw, thuhaksa a tuamtuam na thuak uh ciangin lungdamna dingin na ngaihsun zaw un
Tua bangin na upna hong hong kize-etna na thuakzawh uh ciangin na kipna uh hong kilangsak ahihna thu na thei uh hi
A kisam bangmah omloin a cingtaak na suahtheihna dingun na thuakna uh hangin a tawntungin na kip paisuakna dingun na ngaihsun un
Pilna kisam na om uh leh Pasian kiangah ngen un. Mi khempeuh tungah Pasian dikin cingh mahmah ahih manin hong pia ding hi
Ahi zongin na nget uh ciangin hong pia takpi ding hi, ci-in muan'na tawh na ngen un. A muanglah mite pen huih nun'na lam peuhah a kinil kawikawi tuihualte tawh kibang lel hi
Tua bang mite, lungsim kip a neilo, a kineihkhem hi lel uh a, Topa kiang panin bangmah a ngah hetloh ding lamtak uh a theih ding uh ahi hi
Miniamte in liatna a ngah ciangin lungdam uh hen
Mihaute zong a niam uh ciangin lungdam veve uh hen. Lopa pak bangin a mangthang veve ding ahi uh hi
Ni hong suakin a sat ciangin lopate vul a, a pakte pulhin a hoihnateng a bei mah bangin a haute zong manlahin a om laitakun siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi.
A hoih takpi mah hiam, ci-in sinna a thuak ciangin a nangzote a hampha mahmah ahi hi. Tua bangin a nangzote in, amah a itte tungah Pasian in a piakdingin a ciam nuntakna lukhu a ngah ding uh hi
Mi khat peuhpeuh in tua bang ze-etna a thuak ciangin, “Pasian in kei hong ze-et hi,” ci-in ngaihsun kei hen. Siatna in Pasian ze-et ngeilo a, mite a siatna dingin Pasian in zong ze-et ngeilo hi
Mi khatpeuh in ama deihna zui-in a gamtat ciangin mawhna a piangsak ahi hi
Lungsim utna a gol semsem ciangin mawhna hong piang a, mawhna hong cingtaak ciangin sihna hong piang hi
Sanggamte aw, mite' khemsa-in om kei un
A hoih thu leh na khempeuh, Pasian kiang panin hong pai hi a, vantung khuavak a Piangsakpa ahih manin amah kikheel ngeilo a, amah a kihei manin khua zong mial tuanlo hi
Ama pian'sakte khempeuh lakah eite a masa pen i suahtheihna dingin thuman thutak zangin ama utthu tawh eite a hong piangsak tawm ahi hi.
Sanggamte aw, note in na theihding uh ka deih thu in: Thu kigen khempeuh hoihtakin ngai pahpah un. Ahi zongin pau pahpah kei un la, heh pakpak kei un
Mihingte' hehna in Pasian' sepding thuhoihte khaktan hi
Tua ahih manin ngeina hoihlote leh gamtat siate khempeuh nusia un la, Pasian' thu mangin note' lungsim sungah a hong koih thu zui un. Tua thu in note hong honkhia thei hi
Nomau kikhem tawmin thu zak bek tawh maisak kei un la, na zak bangun zui-in semzaw un
Mi khat in thu a zak bek tawh maisakin a zakna bangin a zuih kei leh limlangah a maitang a ki-en mipa tawh kibang bek hi
Limlangah a ki-en mipa in amah hoihtakin a kimuh khit ciangin paikhia a, bangci pian ka hi hiam cih a mangngilh pah hi

Ahi zongin mite a suaktasak thei thukham cingtaak hoihtakin a et khit ciangin a thu ngai-in a mangngilh pah hiloin, hoihtakin ngaihsun tawntungin a zuite pen a sepna khempeuh uhah Pasian in thupha a pia ding hi
Mi khatpeuh in Khristian ka hi hi, ci napi-in kampau a kidopzawh kei leh amahmah a kikhemtawm hi lel a, ama biakna neih a mawkna ahi hi
Pa Pasian in a siangtho biakna citakin a ngaihsut thu in: Tagahte leh meigong numeite a haksatna uhah hoihtakin kemin, leitung siatnate tawh kisawhkha loin siangtho takin omna ahi hi.
